care.summary: A whimsical jade variety with tubular, finger-like leaves tipped in red in bright light.
care.light: Bright light with some direct sun; red tips intensify with sun exposure
care.water: Soak and dry thoroughly; let soil dry completely between waterings
care.soil: Gritty cactus/succulent mix with sharp drainage
care.humidity: Low to average; thrives in dry indoor conditions
care.fertilizer: Dilute succulent fertilizer monthly in spring and summer
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic if ingested; keep away from pets
common_issues: Leaf drop from sudden temperature changes or cold drafts
Etiolation with elongated stems in insufficient light
Mealybugs on stems and leaf joints
tips: The red tips are a sign of adequate light — greener leaves mean more light needed
Propagates easily from single leaves or stem cuttings
Use a heavy pot to prevent tipping as the plant grows top-heavy
